name: morpheus
description: Morpheus is a research platform from North Star Systems Security Lab (NS3L).

scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.build: pnpm run build:apps && pnpm run build:js-tools
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer build
scripts.smoke:tool:buildroot: node apps/morpheus/dist/cli.js --json --config morpheus.yaml workflow run --name buildroot-build-ci
scripts.smoke:tool:microkit-sdk: node apps/morpheus/dist/cli.js --json --config morpheus.yaml workflow run --name microkit-sdk-build-ci
scripts.smoke:tool:qemu: node apps/morpheus/dist/cli.js --json --config morpheus.yaml workflow run --name qemu-build-ci
scripts.smoke:tool:sel4: node apps/morpheus/dist/cli.js --json --config morpheus.yaml workflow run --name sel4-build-ci
scripts.smoke:tool:libvmm: node apps/morpheus/dist/cli.js --json --config morpheus.yaml workflow run --name libvmm-build-ci
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/outline-to-paper test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/outline-to-paper lint
